mapper.select:
SELECT carousel.*, CASE WHEN carousel.target_type = 'article' THEN article.title WHEN carousel.target_type = 'case' THEN `case`.title END as target_title FROM carousel LEFT JOIN article ON carousel.target_type = 'article' AND carousel.target_id = article.id LEFT JOIN `case` ON carousel.target_type = 'case' AND carousel.target_id = `case`.id
AND (article.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{targetTitle}, '%') OR `case`.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{targetTitle}, '%'))
ORDER BY carousel.id DESC
mapper.insert:
insert into `carousel`
id, img, target_type, target_id,
#{id}, #{img}, #{targetType}, #{targetId},
mapper.update:
update `carousel`
img = #{img},
target_type = #{targetType},
target_id = #{targetId},
where id = #{id}
